title: stachys officinalis var. montana
intro: Stachys officinalis var. montana, also known as Wood Betony or Mountain Betony, is a perennial herb in the mint family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antispasmodic effects, making it effective in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, headaches, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Wood Betony include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Wood Betony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
